billing_text: Each shop is equipped with an intelligent virtual assistant that responds to text, audio, and image messages from your customers, finalizes sales, and captures orders on WhatsApp. Its operation is based on a token system: the number of tokens is calculated and deducted from your balance for each message. The calculation includes both incoming tokens, calculated from the customer's message, and outgoing tokens, calculated from the assistant's response.
usage_text: AI credit consumption for the month of
welcome_text: Reinvent your online business with ShopIA, the platform that combines artificial intelligence and ease of use. Every ShopIA store comes with a virtual assistant that responds to messages, negotiates prices, and captures orders on WhatsApp for you!🔥. Try ShopIA for free for a month and discover how AI can propel your business to new heights!
trusted_text: Over 100 companies trust ShopIA to boost their online business. Our platform has proven itself by offering innovative and effective solutions to meet the needs of today's merchants.
features_text: With a combination of cutting-edge artificial intelligence, user-friendly interface, and innovative features, our app offers an unparalleled experience. Explore our features and let our app transform your selling experience!
chat_bot_text: Free yourself from repetitive tasks by letting our virtual assistant automatically handle your messages, negotiate product prices, capture orders, and provide impeccable customer service on WhatsApp.
dashboard_text: Simplify managing your business with our user-friendly dashboard. Track your orders, manage your products, and retain customers effortlessly.
delivery_text: Collaborating with delivery companies has never been easier. With ShopIA, streamline your deliveries and ensure exceptional customer experience at every step.
support_text: We're here for you anytime. Our dedicated team is available 24/7 to answer your questions, solve your problems, and assist you every step of the way.
stats_text: Discover some key figures that illustrate the power and effectiveness of our app. With remarkable performances such as increased conversion rate, reduced average response time, and improved customer satisfaction, our app makes a real difference for our users. Explore these inspiring statistics and see how our app can transform your business!
how_work_text: Follow these simple steps to get started with our platform and say goodbye to stress today!
step1_text_1: or download one of our applications to get started.
step2_text: Create an account now and enjoy a free one-month trial
step3_text: Create your shop and link it to WhatsApp to start selling.
question: Have any questions? Check out our
pricing_text: Discover our simple and transparent pricing model, designed to meet your needs hassle-free.
faqs_text: Find answers to your most frequently asked questions.
download_text: Enhance your experience with ShopIA by downloading our app to your mobile device, or access our web platform. Simplify managing your online business and enjoy increased efficiency wherever you are. Download now to experience the power of ShopIA!
newsletter_text: Be the first to receive all updates!
subscription_fail: You have already subscribed to our newsletter
deliver_title: Boost the pace of your deliveries 🚚 with ShopIA.
deliver_text: Are you a delivery company looking to increase your number of deliveries? ShopIA allows you to find merchants to collaborate with for their deliveries. Join us for free now and start earning more money!
partner_title: Earn money 💸 by referring merchants to ShopIA.
partner_text: Are you an influencer, trainer, or blogger? Earn money on ShopIA by encouraging e-commerce merchants to join the platform and receive a bonus for each subscription renewal for one year.
upgrade_plan: Your current subscription plan does not allow you to add a new shop.
